author: Gary Yang
name: SpikingMLP + GRU readout (T=4, H_GRU=64)
blurb: Non-record 8xH100 submission. Replaces each Block's relu^2 MLP with a per-token T=4 LIF + GRUCell readout (zero-init output). Hits the 'adapter on random linear maps' and 'per-token state-space' wishlist items while keeping the rest of the root train_gpt.py (9x512, GQA 8/4, tied embeds, SP-1024) intact.
